title: viola tracheliifolia var. olokelensis
intro: Viola tracheliifolia var. olokelensis is a rare and endemic plant species native to the islands of Hawaii, also known as the Olokele violet. It belongs to the violet family (Violaceae) and is characterized by its delicate white flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola tracheliifolia var. olokelensis include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of skin conditions, with herbal preparations often taking the form of infusions, salves, or poultices.
